name: player_stat_from_plays numerator/denominator column with equal-endpoint year_offset collapses to a single-year shift under a year split
description: Regression sibling to the create_team_share_stat case: a has_numerator_denominator from-plays column (completion %) under an equal-endpoint year_offset ([-1,-1]) must keep its CTE collapsed (project pass_comp_pct_from_plays, not _numerator/_denominator) so the year-correlated join and outer SELECT read an existing column. is_year_offset_range treats [k,k] as a single-year shift, not a range.
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "tb003be15bf7297f490a2aeb214c90490" as materialized (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sk is null or sk = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN sk is null or sk = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) ELSE 0 END as pass_comp_pct_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "tb003be15bf7297f490a2aeb214c90490"."pass_comp_pct_from_plays" AS "pass_comp_pct_from_plays_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tb003be15bf7297f490a2aeb214c90490" on "tb003be15bf7297f490a2aeb214c90490"."pid" = "player"."pid" and tb003be15bf7297f490a2aeb214c90490.year = player_years.year + -1 group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "tb003be15bf7297f490a2aeb214c90490"."pass_comp_pct_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
